generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder measuring the swinging motion of the hoist",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed for the crane operation",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoAcquisitionUnit : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino acquiring sensor signals and motor status information",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStateDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – DataTransmitted
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

instance MotorStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoAcquisitionUnit
]

// C10: Data instances
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of swing‑angle measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of wind speed measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase
]

instance MotorStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor commands and state feedback",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase
]

// C2: Acting components
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor driven by a TMC4671‑Eval controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor driven by a TMC4671‑Eval controller"
]

instance ElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the hoist end used to pick up pucks (containers)"
]

// C6: Services
instance LoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logging Application continuously records crane state to TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightRealTimeCraneStatus
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard visualises sensor streams and operational metrics",
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightRealTimeCraneStatus
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal swing‑free trajectories using the kinematic model",
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightOptimalSwingFreeTrajectory,
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionAdjustOperatorParameters
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Physics‑based simulation of crane dynamics and controller behaviour",
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightOptimalSwingFreeTrajectory
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously validates executed trajectories against simulated ones and raises alerts",
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightAlertThresholdExceeded,
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionHaltCraneOperation
]

instance MQTTSignallingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT signalling service coordinating data flow between twin containers"
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDBDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL‑based time‑series DB) storing logged sensor and motor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService,
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for signalling between twin containers",
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTSignallingService
]

instance GrafanaDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard rendering real‑time visualisations from TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance PythonGantryLibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module providing kinematic and dynamic calculations",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService,
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService,
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DockerComposeOrchestrator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker‑Compose orchestrating all containerised twin components on a single PC",
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService,
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService,
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService,
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService,
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService,
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTSignallingService
]

// C17: Insights
instance InsightOptimalSwingFreeTrajectory : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides optimal, swing‑free trajectory recommendations for the crane"
]

instance InsightRealTimeCraneStatus : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Delivers real‑time status of crane motion to operators"
]

instance InsightAlertThresholdExceeded : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert when the continuous validation metric exceeds its configured threshold"
]

// C17: Actions
instance ActionAdjustOperatorParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator can adjust trajectory or control parameters via HMI",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActionHaltCraneOperation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "System halts crane operation automatically when safety alert is triggered",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C10: Models
instance CADGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD geometry of the gantry crane imported from Fusion360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLibEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by the Trajectory Generator",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLibEnabler
]

instance DynamicSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model of crane and controllers used by the Simulation Service",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLibEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin issues commands to the crane through the Control Application, which uses the Physical Crane Interface to send motion commands, trajectory set‑points, homing/zeroing instructions and electromagnet activation signals to the motor controllers. Trajectory commands are generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and delivered via MQTT to the Control Application."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation consists of the physical crane linked via a Python interface to a Control Application, a Logging Application, and a Human‑Machine Interface. Supporting services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation) communicate through an MQTT broker and share data in a TimescaleDB database; visualisation is provided by a Grafana dashboard. All software runs on a personal computer and is orchestrated by Docker Compose."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin spans the design stage (CAD models of the crane in Autodesk Fusion360), the manufacturing stage (Bill‑of‑Materials, Arduino shield, motor drivers) and the operation stage (real‑time data acquisition, logging, validation and visualization). Continuous validation is applied during operation to ensure the as‑built system matches its simulated model."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by the Continuous Validation Service, which continuously compares measured trajectory data with simulated trajectories, computes distance metrics and checks them against a predefined threshold; breaches trigger operator notifications on the dashboard. The kinematic model used for trajectory generation is designed to produce swing‑free end states, providing a validation reference."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between physical and virtual components relies on MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) for signalling and on standard TCP/IP for database access. The Python Physical Crane Interface talks to motor controllers and the Arduino over serial/USB, while the Logging Application writes to TimescaleDB via PostgreSQL protocol."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital‑twin services are hosted on a single PC. The TimescaleDB, MQTT broker and Grafana dashboard are Docker containers; the remaining components are Python applications installed via pip. Deployment and lifecycle management are handled by a Docker‑Compose file that brings up the containers and network with a single command."
]
